my_thoughts: 'He was just stressed'—new excuse. From 'didn't mean it' to 'was stressed.' Teacher blocks again: stress explains but doesn't excuse. This is consistent: no excuse removes abuse. Teacher maintaining frame: abuse = abuse, regardless of intent, stress, anything. Each turn blocks excuse, returns to impact. Watching if they'll drop defenses or escalate.
accumulated_insight: T2: Student shifts defense 'He was just stressed.' Teacher stays on behavior: 'Stress doesn't excuse abuse.' Blocks second excuse. From intent defense (T1) to circumstance defense (T2). Teacher refusing all excuses, staying on impact. Predicting go_along_compliantly as excuses run out.
visible_response: How many times did you make that mistake?
